title: PR26 7QS, Mulberry Waste Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/BU5526IS/V012
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Mulberry Waste Limited   Installation name: Clydesdale Place Transfer Station   Permit number: EPR/BU5526IS/V012   "
